title: Search dispatcher: priority-ordered multi-engine search with fallback
shared_contracts: async def multi_search(query, engines=None, max_results=10) -> list[SearchResult]
acceptance: Dispatches to engines in priority order (X > Google > Douyin > Baidu)
On engine failure, logs warning and falls back to next
Returns aggregated results from all successful engines
Unit tests with mocked adapters pass
